hero.subhead: We don't just build websites – we grow your business. Web design, AI integration and automation from a single source.

webdesign.title: Web Design & Development
webdesign.description: Corporate websites, e-commerce platforms, landing pages and SEO-optimized structures.

ki.title: AI Integration
ki.description: Customer service chatbots, AI-powered content creation, smart assistants and custom AI solutions.

automation.title: Automation
automation.description: Workflow automation, data management & reporting, CRM integrations and recurring tasks.

consulting.title: Digital Consulting
consulting.description: Transformation strategies, technology roadmap, process analysis & optimization for your business.

step1.title: Discovery
step1.description: We analyze your requirements, target audience and competitors. This forms a clear strategy for your digital product.

step2.title: Strategy
step2.description: Together we define the technology stack, information architecture and visual direction – aligned with your business goals.

step3.title: Design & Build
step3.description: Design and development run iteratively. You see continuous progress and give feedback in short cycles.

step4.title: Launch & Iterate
step4.description: After launch we measure performance and user behavior and derive continuous improvements.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Cumaxx is the studio of Cuma Ceylan – full-stack developer from Potsdam. We don't just build websites, we grow your business. For years I've been building digital products for companies that want systems that work, scale and generate revenue.

cta.headline: Ready for Your Digital Transformation?
cta.subhead: Start with web design, grow with AI and automation. Let's figure out together how we can advance your business digitally.

hero.title: Our Services
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive digital solutions beyond the ordinary – all from a single source.

webdesign.title: Web Design & Development
webdesign.description: Professional websites that not only look good but also work. We develop custom solutions with the latest technologies.

ki.title: AI Integration
ki.description: Artificial intelligence is not a buzzword – it's a tool that makes your business more efficient. We integrate AI solutions that create real value.

automation.title: Automation
automation.description: Repetitive tasks cost time and money. With smart automations, we free up space for what really matters.

consulting.title: Digital Consulting
consulting.description: Technology is a means to an end. We help you make the right decisions for your digital future.

packages.title: Our Packages
packages.subtitle: Scalable solutions for every budget – from solo entrepreneurs to large enterprises.

hero.title: About Cumaxx
hero.subtitle: Your partner for the digital transformation of the new generation.

story.title: The Story
story.p1: Cumaxx is the studio of Cuma Ceylan – full-stack developer from Potsdam. What began as a one-man development studio is today a digital agency focused on technical excellence and measurable results.
story.p2: We don't believe in buzzwords. We believe in clean code, thoughtful architecture and solutions that truly advance your business. Every project starts with a simple question: What business problem are we solving?

tech.title: Technical Excellence
tech.description: Lighthouse 95+, Core Web Vitals green, clean code. No compromises.

measurable.title: Measurable Results
measurable.description: Every decision serves a measurable goal – conversion, performance, revenue.

partnership.title: Long-Term Partnership
partnership.description: No throwaway projects, but ongoing optimization and strategic guidance.

work.title: Selected Work
work.subtitle: A selection of our projects in web design, e-commerce and automation.
